file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - "master"
  pull_request:

env:
  GOLANGCILINT_VERSION: "2.11.4"

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.26.1"
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9
        with:
          version: v${{ env.GOLANGCILINT_VERSION }}

  test:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            test_target: test-race
            GOARCH: amd64
            # race requires cgo, otherwise should not be needed
            CGO_ENABLED: 1
          # build and test on 32 bit, does not support race
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            test_target: test
            GOARCH: "386"
            CGO_ENABLED: 0
          - os: macos-latest
            test_target: test
            GOARCH: amd64
            CGO_ENABLED: 0
          - os: windows-latest
            test_target: test
            GOARCH: amd64
            CGO_ENABLED: 0
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      # only run cli binary tests on linux
      - name: Install expect
        if: ${{ matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest' }}
        run: sudo apt-get install expect
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v3
        with:
          go-version: "1.26.1"
      - name: Test
        env:
          CGO_ENABLED: ${{ matrix.CGO_ENABLED }}
          GOARCH: ${{ matrix.GOARCH }}
        run: make ${{ matrix.test_target }}

content.thinking:
Perfect! Now I have the workflow details. The job that I'm reproducing is the first test matrix entry:
- os: ubuntu-latest
- test_target: test-race
- GOARCH: amd64
- CGO_ENABLED: 1

Steps:
1. Install expect (only on ubuntu-latest)
2. Checkout code (actions/checkout@v3)
3. Setup Go (actions/setup-go@v3 with go-version 1.26.1)
4. Run test: `make test-race` with environment variables CGO_ENABLED=1 and GOARCH=amd64

Now let me check what the Makefile contains to understand what "make test-race" does.

content.content:
1	GO_BUILD_FLAGS ?= -trimpath
2	GO_BUILD_LDFLAGS ?= -s -w
3	
4	all: test fq
5	
6	# used to force make to always redo
7	.PHONY: always
8	
9	fq: always
10		CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o fq -ldflags "${GO_BUILD_LDFLAGS}" ${GO_BUILD_FLAGS} .
11	
12	test: always testgo testjq testcli
13	test-race: always testgo-race testjq testcli
14	
15	# figure out all go packages with test files
16	testgo: PKGS=$(shell find . -name "*_test.go" | xargs -n 1 dirname | sort | uniq)
17	testgo: always
18		go test -timeout 20m ${RACE} ${VERBOSE} ${COVER} ${PKGS}
19	
20	testgo-race: RACE=-race
21	testgo-race: testgo
22	
23	testjq: $(shell find . -name "*.jq.test")
24	%.jq.test: fq
25		@echo $@
26	# set HOME to something non-existing to not accidentally include from config dir
27		@HOME=/does_not_exist ./fq -rRs -L pkg/interp 'include "jqtest"; run_tests' $@
28	
29	testcli: fq
30		@pkg/cli/test_exp.sh ./fq pkg/cli/test_repl.exp
31		@pkg/cli/test_exp.sh ./fq pkg/cli/test_cli_ctrlc.exp
32		@pkg/cli/test_exp.sh ./fq pkg/cli/test_cli_ctrld.exp
33	
34	cover: COVER=-cover -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=cover.out
35	cover: test
36		go tool cover -html=cover.out -o cover.out.html
37		cat cover.out.html | grep '<option value="file' | sed -E 's/.*>(.*) \((.*)%\)<.*/\2 \1/' | sort -rn
38	
39	doc: always
40	doc: $(wildcard doc/*.svg.sh)
41	doc: $(wildcard *.md doc/*.md)
42	
43	%.md: fq
44		@doc/mdsh.sh ./fq $@
45	
46	doc/%.svg.sh: fq
47		(cd doc ; ../$@ ../fq) | go run github.com/wader/ansisvg@master > $(@:.svg.sh=.svg)
48	
49	doc/formats.svg: fq
50		@# ignore graphviz version as it causes diff when nothing has changed
51		./fq -rnf doc/formats_diagram.jq | dot -Tsvg | sed 's/Generated by graphviz.*//' >doc/formats.svg
52	
53	doc/file.mp3: Makefile
54		ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i sine -f lavfi -i testsrc -map 0:0 -map 1:0 -t 20ms "$@"
55	
56	doc/file.mp4: Makefile
57		ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i sine -f lavfi -i testsrc -c:a aac -c:v h264 -f mp4 -t 20ms "$@"
58	
59	gogenerate: always
60		go generate -x ./...
61	
62	lint: always
63	# bump: make-golangci-lint /golangci-lint@v([\d.]+)/ git:https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint.git|^2
64	# bump: make-golangci-lint link "Release notes" https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases/tag/v$LATEST
65		go run github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.11.3 run
66	
67	depgraph.svg: always
68		go run github.com/kisielk/godepgraph@latest github.com/wader/fq | dot -Tsvg -o godepgraph.svg
69	
70	# make memprof ARGS=". test.mp3"
71	# make cpuprof ARGS=". test.mp3"
72	prof: always
73		go build -tags profile -o fq.prof .
74		CPUPROFILE=fq.cpu.prof MEMPROFILE=fq.mem.prof ./fq.prof ${ARGS}
75	memprof: prof
76		go tool pprof -http :5555 fq.prof fq.mem.prof
77	cpuprof: prof
78		go tool pprof -http :5555 fq.prof fq.cpu.prof
79	
80	update-gomod: always
81		GOPROXY=direct go get github.com/wader/gojq@fq
82		go mod tidy
83	
84	# Usage: make fuzz # fuzz all foramts
85	# Usage: make fuzz GROUP=mp4 # fuzz a group (each format is a group also)
86	# TODO: as decode recovers panic and "repanics" unrecoverable errors this is a bit hacky at the moment
87	# Retrigger:
88	# try to decode crash with all formats in order to see which one panicked:
89	# cat format/testdata/fuzz/FuzzFormats/... | go run dev/fuzzbytes.go | go run . -d bytes '. as $b | formats | keys[] as $f | $b | decode($f)'
90	# convert crash into raw bytes:
91	# cat format/testdata/fuzz/FuzzFormats/... | go run dev/fuzzbytes.go | fq -d bytes to_base64
92	# fq -n '"..." | from_base64 | ...'
93	fuzz: always
94	# in other terminal: tail -f /tmp/repanic
95		FUZZTEST=1 go test -v -run Fuzz -fuzz=Fuzz ./format/
96	
97	# usage: make release VERSION=0.0.1
98	# tag forked dependeces for history and to make then stay around
99	release: always
100	release: WADER_GOJQ_COMMIT=$(shell go list -m -f '{{.Version}}' github.com/wader/gojq | sed 's/.*-\(.*\)/\1/')
101	release:
102		@echo "# wader/fq":
103		@echo "# make sure head is at wader/master"
104		@echo git fetch wader
105		@echo git show
106		@echo make lint test doc
107		@echo go mod tidy
108		@echo git diff
109		@echo
110		@echo "sed 's/version = "\\\(.*\\\)"/version = \"${VERSION}\"/' fq.go > fq.go.new && mv fq.go.new fq.go"
111		@echo git add fq.go
112		@echo git commit -m \"fq: Update version to ${VERSION}\"
113		@echo git push wader master
114		@echo
115		@echo "# make sure head master commit CI was successful"
116		@echo open https://github.com/wader/fq/commit/master
117		@echo git tag v${VERSION}
118		@echo
119		@echo "# wader/gojq:"
120		@echo git tag fq-v${VERSION} ${WADER_GOJQ_COMMIT}
121		@echo git push wader fq-v${VERSION}:fq-v${VERSION}
122		@echo
123		@echo "# wader/fq":
124		@echo git push wader v${VERSION}:v${VERSION}
125		@echo "# edit draft release notes and publish"
126

content.thinking:
Perfect! Now I understand what `make test-race` does:
1. Line 13: test-race depends on testgo-race and testjq and testcli
2. Line 20-21: testgo-race sets RACE=-race and runs testgo
3. Line 16-18: testgo runs `go test -timeout 20m ${RACE} ${VERBOSE} ${COVER} ${PKGS}` where RACE=-race
4. Line 23-27: testjq builds fq and then runs jq tests
5. Line 29-32: testcli builds fq and runs CLI tests using expect

So the full test process is:
1. `make test-race` which includes:
   - Run go tests with -race flag: `go test -timeout 20m -race ./...`
   - Build fq binary
   - Run jq tests using the binary
   - Run CLI tests using expect

Now I need to create a Dockerfile and run.sh to reproduce this in Docker. Here's what I need:

**Dockerfile:**
- FROM ubuntu:22.04 (since runs-on is ubuntu-latest)
- Install Go 1.26.1
- Install expect (for CLI tests)
- Install build tools (gcc, build-essential for CGO)
- Copy the repo
- Install dependencies

**run.sh:**
- Set CGO_ENABLED=1
- Set GOARCH=amd64
- Run: make test-race

Let me create the Dockerfile and run.sh now.

content.text: Now I have all the information I need. Let me write the **Dockerfile** and **run.sh**:

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    curl \
    expect \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://golang.org/dl/go1.26.1.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar -xz -C /usr/local

ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

export CGO_ENABLED=1
export GOARCH=amd64

echo "=== Starting fq test-race ==="
echo "Go version: $(go version)"
echo "Architecture: $GOARCH"
echo "CGO enabled: $CGO_ENABLED"
echo ""

cd /app
make test-race

echo ""
echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
